title: R0: candidate-recall CDF + rerank cost model

ce_latency.hardware: AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 5945WX (24 logical CPUs)

key_findings: Dense arm (BGE-small-en HNSW) saturates at K=200 for both classes — flat 0.653 exact_fact and 0.323 exploratory from K=200 to K=1000
BM25 (text_only) dominates for exact_fact queries; rrf_fused adds marginal value over BM25 alone for exact_fact
For exploratory, rrf_fused outperforms bm25 at K>=200 but gains are small (+0.6pp at K=1000)
Depth-50 ceiling: exact_fact=0.950 (high, K=50 sufficient), exploratory=0.510 (low, needs deeper retrieval)
Recommended Slice 10 rerank depth: K=200 (21.8pp improvement for exploratory vs K=50, fits AC-013 budget with TinyBERT-L-2)
Oracle ceiling at K=200: exact_fact=0.973, exploratory=0.764 — sets Slice 10 maximum

self_check.full_suite_status: 1 pre-existing failure (recency_does_not_override_a_clear_rrf_signal in pr_g12_recency.rs — introduced by concurrent slice work, NOT from Slice 5)

stray_edits.canonical_lib_rs: WARN: src/rust/crates/fathomdb-engine/src/lib.rs has unstaged modifications from concurrent slice-20+35 agent — NOT from Slice 5 (zero engine source changes)

blockers_encountered.description: Full corpus seeding (10,506 docs × BGE-small-en embeddings + HNSW insertions) took 69 minutes at 2.5 docs/s peak. Queries took 27 minutes. Total run: 96.6 minutes.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Completed — run completed successfully; results are from the full corpus

blockers_encountered.description: ms-marco-MiniLM-L6-v2 is not available in flashrank (404 HTTP). Only L-12 and TinyBERT-L-2 are available.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Used ms-marco-MiniLM-L-12-v2 as a substitute (12 layers vs 6 — conservative upper bound on L-6 latency). Exact L-6 measurement deferred to Slice 10 with sentence-transformers.

blockers_encountered.description: Canonical repo has unstaged modification to src/rust/crates/fathomdb-engine/src/lib.rs from concurrent slice-20+35 agent. NOT introduced by Slice 5.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Reported — not my slice's responsibility. Slice 5 has zero engine source changes.

blockers_encountered.description: recency_does_not_override_a_clear_rrf_signal in pr_g12_recency.rs fails in both canonical and worktree — introduced by earlier Slice 10/15 RED test, not yet fixed.
DOC-INDEX.md had a merge conflict (slice-35 design memo entry added by concurrent slice). Resolved by keeping both entries.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Resolved — both slice-35-design.md and slice-5-design.md entries kept

deviations_from_spec.description: CE latency script updated: (1) MiniLM-L12 used instead of unavailable MiniLM-L6; (2) cache_dir=None → default /tmp (bugfix for flashrank API). These are corrections to the script, not functional deviations.

slice_10_gate.note: Per ADR §2.4: R0 gates R1 (Slice 10). Slice 10 may now open.
